reviews.comment:
MUY BUENA ATENCION,,,TODOS LOS SERVICIOS,,,PREGUNTE POR UNA SALIDA DE RUTA PARA COMUNICARME CON LA 226 Y ME HICIERON PASAR AL PRIVADO EN LA CUAL ME ATENDIO UNA SEÑORITA MUY ATENTA ( NO VINAGRE) NO SOLAMENTE ME EXPLICO SINO QUE TAMBIEN ME IMPRIMIO UN MAPA,,,MUY BIEN PARA APLAUDIR Y DESTACAR QUE NO SON UN NUMERO NOMAS,,, GRACIAS....

(Translated by Google)
VERY GOOD SERVICE,,,ALL SERVICES,,,I ASKED FOR AN EXIT TO CONNECT WITH THE 226 AND THEY MADE ME GO TO THE PRIVATE CAR WHERE A VERY ATTENTIVE LADY ATTENDED ME (NOT VINEGAR) NOT ONLY EXPLAINED ME BUT ALSO PRINTED ME A MAP,,,VERY GOOD TO APPLAUD AND HIGHLIGHT THAT THEY ARE NOT JUST A NUMBER,,, THANK YOU....
